input validation\n    \"\"\"\n    # Input validation guards\n    if not isinstance(undiscounted_option_price, (int, float)):\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price type: {type(undiscounted_option_price)}\")\n        return None\n        \n    if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n        \n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    if undiscounted_option_price <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid undiscounted price: {undiscounted_option_price}\")\n        return None\n    \n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}, flag={flag}\")\n        return None\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Unexpected calculation error: {e}\")\n        return None\n```\n\n#### 2. **Improve Cloudflare API Error Handling**\n\n**Priority:** HIGH  \n**Impact:** Eliminates 50 API 404 errors\n\n```python\ndef safe_deployment_verification(deployment_id, max_retries=3):\n    \"\"\"\n    Verify Cloudflare deployment with proper error handling\n    \"\"\"\n    for attempt in range(max_retries):\n        try:\n            deployment = check_deployment_exists(deployment_id)\n            if not deployment:\n                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, skipping verification\")\n                return False\n            return True\n            \n        except HTTPError as e:\n            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n                logger.warning(f\"Attempt {attempt + 1}: Deployment {deployment_id} not found\")\n                if attempt < max_retries - 1:\n                    time.sleep(2 ** attempt)  # Exponential backoff\n                    continue\n                else:\n                    logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found after {max_retries} attempts\")\n                    return False\n            else:\n                raise\n        except Exception as e:\n            logger.error(f\"Unexpected error checking deployment: {e}\")\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 3. **Clean Up Failed Pods**\n\n**Priority:** HIGH  \n**Impact:** Improved operational hygiene\n\n```bash\n# Options pipeline cleanup\nkubectl  \n366\t            # Deployment exists, verify it\n367\t            return verify_deployment_status(deployment)\n368\t            \n369\t        except HTTPError as e:\n370\t            if found after {max_retries} retries\")\n374\t                    return False\n375\t                time.sleep(2 ** retry_count)  # Exponential backoff\n376\t            else:\n377\t                raise  # Re-raise non-404 errors\n378\t```\n379\t\n380\t#### 3. **Clean Up Failed Pods in Both Systems**\n381\t**Priority:** MEDIUM  \n382\t**Impact:** Improved operational hygiene and resource \"\"\"Prevent cascade failures from external dependencies.\"\"\"\n452\t    def __init__(self, failure_threshold=5, timeout=60):\n453\t        self.failure_threshold = failure_threshold\n454\t        self.timeout = timeout\n455\t        self.failure_count = 0\n456\t        self.last_failure_time = None\n457\t        self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n458\t    \n459\t    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n460\t        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection.\"\"\"\n461\t        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n462\t            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n463\t                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n464\t            else:\n465\t                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError()\n466\t        \n467\t        try:\n468\t            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n469\t            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n470\t                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n471\t                self.failure_count = 0\n472\t            return result\n473\t        except Exception as e:\n474\t            self.failure_count += 1\n475\t            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n476\t            if self.failure_count >= self.failure_threshold:\n477\t                self.state = 'OPEN'\n478\t            raise\n479\t```\n480\t\n481\t#### 9. **Enhance Observability Infrastructure**\n482\t- Deploy structured logging \"\"\"Safe calculation with input validation.\"\"\"\n    # Input validation guards\n    if t <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid time parameter: t={t}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None  # or appropriate default value\n    \n    if F <= 0 or K <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid price parameters: F={F}, K={K}, skipping calculation\")\n        return None\n    \n    if undiscounted_option_price <= 0:\n        logger.warning(f\"Invalid option price: {undiscounted_option_price}, skipping\")\n        return None\n    \n    # Proceed with calculation only if inputs are valid\n    try:\n        return vectorized_implied_volatility(\n            undiscounted_option_price, F, K, t, flag\n        )\n    except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Calculation failed: price={undiscounted_option_price}, F={F}, K={K}, t={t}, flag={flag}\")\n        return None\n    except Exception as e:\n        logger.error(f\"Unexpected calculation error: {e}\")\n        return None\n```\n\n**Testing Requirements:**\n- Unit tests with edge case inputs (zero, negative values)\n- Integration tests with historical data that triggered errors\n- Monitoring for calculation success/failure rates\n\n#### 2. **Fix Cloudflare API Integration Issues**\n**Priority:** HIGH  \n**Business Impact:** Eliminates 618 API errors, reduces retry waste  \n**Timeline:** Implement within 1 week\n\n**Solution:**\n```python\ndef verify_deployment_with_fallback(deployment_id):\n    \"\"\"Verify deployment exists before checking status.\"\"\"\n    max_retries = 3\n    retry_count = 0\n    \n    while retry_count < max_retries:\n        try:\n            # First check if deployment exists\n            deployment = get_deployment(deployment_id)\n            if not deployment:\n                logger.warning(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found, skipping verification\")\n                return False  # Signal to skip this deployment\n            \n            # Deployment exists, verify it\n            return verify_deployment_status(deployment)\n            \n        except HTTPError as e:\n            if e.response.status_code == 404:\n                retry_count += 1\n                if retry_count >= max_retries:\n                    logger.error(f\"Deployment {deployment_id} not found after {max_retries} retries\")\n                    return False\n                time.sleep(2 ** retry_count)  # Exponential backoff\n            else:\n                raise  # Re-raise non-404 errors\n```\n\n#### 3. **Clean Up Failed Pods in Both Systems**\n**Priority:** MEDIUM  \n**Impact:** Improved operational hygiene and resource cleanup\n\n**Implementation:**\n```bash\n# Options pipeline - remove unknown status pod\nkubectl --server=http://traefik-iad-options:8001 delete --grace-period=0\n```\n\n### Medium-Term Improvements (Priority 2) 🟡\n\n#### 4. **Implement Comprehensive Input Validation Framework**\n- Add data quality checks before expensive calculations\n- Resilience**\n```python\nclass OptionsCalculator:\n    def safe_calculate_greeks(self, option_data):\n        \"\"\"Calculate with comprehensive error handling.\"\"\"\n        try:\n            # Validate inputs\n            if not self.validate_inputs(option_data):\n                self.logger.warning(f\"Invalid inputs: {option_data.symbol}\")\n                return self.get_default_greeks()\n            \n            # Calculate with error handling\n            return self.calculate_greeks(option_data)\n            \n        except ZeroDivisionError as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Calculation error: {e}\")\n            self.metrics.increment(\"calculation_zero_division\")\n            return self.get_default_greeks()\n            \n        except Exception as e:\n            self.logger.error(f\"Unexpected error: {e}\")\n            self.metrics.increment(\"calculation_unexpected_error\")\n            return self.get_default_greeks()\n```\n\n#### 6. **Add Comprehensive Monitoring and Alerting**\n- **Metrics to Track:**\n  - Error rate per hour for each calculation type\n  - Restart count per pod with self.state = 'CLOSED'  # CLOSED, OPEN, HALF_OPEN\n    \n    def call(self, func, *args, **kwargs):\n        \"\"\"Execute function with circuit breaker protection.\"\"\"\n        if self.state == 'OPEN':\n            if time.time() - self.last_failure_time > self.timeout:\n                self.state = 'HALF_OPEN'\n            else:\n                raise CircuitBreakerOpenError()\n        \n        try:\n            result = func(*args, **kwargs)\n            if self.state == 'HALF_OPEN':\n                self.state = 'CLOSED'\n                self.failure_count = 0\n            return result\n        except Exception as e:\n            self.failure_count += 1\n            self.last_failure_time = time.time()\n            if self.failure_count >= self.failure_threshold:\n                self.state = 'OPEN'\n            raise\n```\n\n#### 9. **Enhance Observability Infrastructure**\n- Deploy structured logging (JSON format) for better parsing\n- Set up Prometheus metrics for
